plant.name: The Prototype Fern
plant.bloomStory: Every idea started as a sketch on a napkin. The fern grew from failed tests and midnight pivots.

plant.name: The Interface Orchid
plant.bloomStory: Beauty that responds to touch. Every petal a button, every leaf a feedback loop.

plant.name: The Pixel Vine
plant.bloomStory: It started with one frame. Then another. Now it climbs every wall, painting as it goes.

plant.name: The Logic Cactus
plant.bloomStory: Thorns of syntax, flowers of function. It survives in any environment.
